\tzpentry{ID3894}{Quantum Casimir Energy Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3894 introduces Quantum Casimir Energy Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} E_{\text{Casimir}} = -\frac{\hbar c \pi^2}{240 d^4} \times \text{Area} + \sum_{m=1}^{\infty} \frac{\hbar\omega_m}{2} \left(1 + \frac{1}{e^{\hbar\omega_m/k_BT} - 1}\right) \end{equation}
